summary: Tested new features: Financing page UI/API, E-Sign templates & audit trail APIs, Analytics insights/trends APIs, and Homepage without 'Our Story' link. Found 1 CRITICAL frontend bug and 1 backend bug.

critical.issue: Returns 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue. Document is created but response fails with: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable")]
critical.fix: Add {'_id': 0} projection when returning the document, or exclude _id from response

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Application modal crashes with 'Send is not defined' error when clicking 'Apply Now' button. The Send icon from lucide-react is used on line 379 but not imported.
ui_bugs.fix: Add 'Send' to the lucide-react imports in /app/frontend/src/pages/Financing.jsx line 3-8

frontend_test_results.note: 1 test fails due to critical Financing modal bug (Send icon not imported)

financing_page.page_load: PASS - Three financing options displayed (Rent-to-Own, Deposit Financing, First Month Free)
financing_page.calculator: PASS - Financing calculator displayed with all inputs
financing_page.how_it_works: PASS - How it works section visible
financing_page.apply_button: FAIL - Crashes with 'Send is not defined' error

financing_api.POST_applications: PASS - Creates applications for all financing types
financing_api.GET_applications: PASS - Returns list with optional filters

esign_api.POST_documents: FAIL - Returns 500 due to ObjectId serialization bug
esign_api.GET_audit_trail: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent docs, audit data for existing

analytics_api.revenue: PASS - Returns revenue analytics with period filter

homepage.our_story_link_removed: PASS - 'Our Story' link is NOT visible in navigation
homepage.navigation_items: PASS - All expected nav items visible (Home, About, Properties, Lease Takeover, Pros, Contact)

dashboard.nova_insights: PASS - Nova Insights link visible in sidebar when logged in

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix Financing.jsx - Add 'Send' to lucide-react imports (line 3-8). Currently: 'Send is not defined' error when clicking Apply Now
HIGH: Fix POST /api/esign/documents - Add {'_id': 0} projection to response to avoid ObjectId serialization error

success_rate.backend: 94% (16/17 passed, 1 skipped due to known bug)
success_rate.frontend: 89% (8/9 passed, 1 failed due to critical bug)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user test@dommma.com / test123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two bugs need fixing: 1) CRITICAL: Financing.jsx missing 'Send' import from lucide-react - application modal is completely broken. 2) HIGH: POST /api/esign/documents returns 500 due to MongoDB _id serialization. All other features (Financing API, E-Sign templates, Analytics APIs, Homepage navigation) work correctly.

financing_modal_bug.root_cause: Missing import - 'Send' icon from lucide-react is used in ApplicationForm component (line 379) but not included in the import statement (lines 3-8)
reproduction_steps: Click 'Apply Now' button on any financing option
Modal appears then crashes with 'Send is not defined' error
financing_modal_bug.mitigation: Add 'Send' to the lucide-react import: import { DollarSign, Calculator, Home, TrendingUp, Shield, CheckCircle, Clock, FileText, ArrowRight, Percent, Building, Key, Wallet, PiggyBank, CreditCard, HelpCircle, ChevronRight, Star, AlertCircle, Loader2, Send } from 'lucide-react';

esign_documents_bug.root_cause: MongoDB document returned directly without excluding _id field. The _id field (ObjectId type) cannot be JSON serialized by FastAPI.
reproduction_steps: Log shows: ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable")]
esign_documents_bug.mitigation: Change line 3352 in server.py to exclude _id: await db.esign_documents.insert_one(document); return {k: v for k, v in document.items() if k != '_id'}
